creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
"FreeBSD 14.1-STABLE stable/14-n267765-5dced4143910" is not an example of "Version CURRENT". CURRENT is for 15 at this point.

I can not fix the Version assignment but getting it to indicate a 14.? STABLE or the like may be important to this being noticed for the 14.1-RELEASE process that is in progress. Otherwise 14.1-RELEASE might not work for what has been reported.
